test.name: Tech Giants 10yr Daily Full Regression
test.description: Full feature regression on 10yr daily data with Bayesian parameter tuning
test.config_json: {"name": "Tech Giants 10yr Daily Full Regression", "description": "Full feature regression on 10yr daily data with Bayesian parameter tuning", "baseline_features": ["returns", "volatility", "volume"], "features_to_test": ["valuation", "rsi", "macd", "bollinger", "atr", "adx", "obv", "gap", "momentum", "mean_reversion", "sentiment"], "tune_on_add": true, "tune_model_params": true, "tuning_trials": 30, "model_tuning_trials": 50, "objective_metric": "mean_rank_ic", "db_path": "data/runs.db"}
